text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf on X. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫在 X 平台上的发言。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: After recent losses and damage to its aerial refueling fleet during operations linked to the Iran conflict, the U.S. Air Force has reactivated retired KC-135 tanker aircraft from storage. This includes a 68-year-old Stratotanker built in 1958, now undergoing maintenance for possible return to service. Source: Bild
text_zh: 在近期与伊朗冲突相关的行动中，美国空军的空中加油机队遭受损失和破坏后，已重新启用了封存的退役 KC-135 加油机。其中包括一架 1958 年制造、现年 68 岁的同温层加油机，目前正在进行维护，以备重返现役。来源：图片报

text: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 ⚡ Trump had invested significant efforts in recent weeks to promote Orbán. Even last week, Trump sent his Vice President, J.D. Vance, to Hungary to express further strong public support for Orbán. Vance promised investments and economic support but Hungarians didn't buy those promises.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 ⚡ 特朗普在过去几周投入了大量精力来支持欧尔班。就在上周，特朗普还派遣副总统 J.D. 万斯前往匈牙利，以表达对欧尔班进一步的强烈公开支持。万斯承诺提供投资和经济支持，但匈牙利人并不买账。

text: Apple Maps appears to have removed the names of all villages in southern Lebanon. This is the exact area Israel is currently trying to occupy.
text_zh: 苹果地图似乎已经删除了黎巴嫩南部所有村庄的名称。这正是以色列目前试图占领的区域。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Enjoy the current pump figures. With the so-called 'blockade'. Soon you'll be nostalgic for $4–$5 gas.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：享受现在的油价吧。随着所谓的“封锁”，很快你们就会怀念 4 到 5 美元的油价了。

text: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 Ursula von der Leyen, President of the European Union, celebrates Orban’s defeat in Hungary:
text_zh: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩庆祝欧尔班在匈牙利落败：

text: 🔄 Forwarded from DD Geopolitics: 🇭🇺 Orbán acknowledged his party’s defeat in the Hungarian parliamentary elections. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 DD Geopolitics：🇭🇺 欧尔班承认其政党在匈牙利议会选举中落败。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Spectator Index Viktor Orban, who has served as PM for 16 years, has conceded defeat in Hungary's election. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043423761618309372/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 旁观者指数：已担任总理 16 年的维克托·欧尔班已承认在匈牙利选举中落败。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043423761618309372/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Ministry of Defense: "The enemy has not been able to bring down our system or dismantle our country or take control of the Strait of Hormuz" tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗国防部：“敌人既没能摧毁我们的系统，也没能瓦解我们的国家，更没能控制霍尔木兹海峡。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Spanish PM Pedro Sanchez: ‘Today Europe wins and European values win. Congratulations to all Hungarian citizens for historic elections. Looking forward to working together, Peter Magyar, for a better future for all Europeans.’ https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043422860346020129/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯：“今天欧洲赢了，欧洲价值观赢了。祝贺所有匈牙利公民完成了历史性的选举。期待与你合作，彼得·马扎尔，为所有欧洲人创造更美好的未来。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043422860346020129/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC's Quds Force Commander, Esmail Qaani: “The U.S. and Israel should remember how they fled from Bab al-Mandab and the Red Sea in the face of Yemen. Now, they will leave the region without achieving anything.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043422845468811348/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼：“美国和以色列应该记住他们是如何在也门面前从曼德海峡和红海逃走的。现在，他们将一无所获地离开该地区。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043422845468811348/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Spokesperson for the Iranian Ministry of Defense: The administration of the Strait of Hormuz will remain under the control of Iran and the region forever. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043422070789259340/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗国防部发言人：霍尔木兹海峡的管理权将永远掌握在伊朗和该地区手中。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043422070789259340/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Deputy Parliament Speaker Hamidreza Haji Babaei called the Strait of Hormuz Iran's "atomic bomb." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043421178761539785/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗议会副议长哈米德雷扎·哈吉·巴巴伊称霍尔木兹海峡为伊朗的“原子弹”。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043421178761539785/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Hungarian opposition figure Péter Magyar says Viktor Orbán called to congratulate them on their victory. Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has just called to congratulate us on our victory. - Magyar Péter (Ne féljetek) tweet
text_zh: 战争监测：匈牙利反对派人物彼得·马扎尔表示，维克托·欧尔班已致电祝贺他们的胜利。维克托·欧尔班总理刚刚致电祝贺我们取得胜利。- 马扎尔·彼得（不要害怕）推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 Supporters are waiting for Péter Magyar following the announcement of partial parliamentary election results. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043420112632394126/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇭🇺 支持者们在部分议会选举结果公布后等待彼得·马扎尔。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043420112632394126/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : A big, big shoutout to @panyiszabolcs for his incredible work, which made a critical difference. Hope to see him in Budapest soon. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @michaeldweiss：向 @panyiszabolcs 致以崇高的敬意，感谢他令人难以置信的工作，这产生了关键性的影响。希望很快能在布达佩斯见到他。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian: If the American government abandons its totalitarianism and respects the rights of the Iranian nation, ways to reach an agreement will certainly be found. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043419507964641357/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬：如果美国政府放弃极权主义并尊重伊朗民族的权利，达成协议的途径肯定会找到。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043419507964641357/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Former Iranian FM Javad Zarif on Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade plan: "The worst gamblers don't know when to leave a losing table." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043418425192599573/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗前外交部长贾瓦德·扎里夫就特朗普的霍尔木兹海峡封锁计划表示：“最糟糕的赌徒往往不知道何时离开输钱的赌桌。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043418425192599573/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Ursula von der Leyen: "Hungary has chosen Europe... A country returns to its European path. The Union grows stronger." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043418153535848604/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩：“匈牙利选择了欧洲……一个国家回归了它的欧洲道路。欧盟变得更加强大。”https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043418153535848604/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Magyar: 'The Chancellor of Germany and the NATO Secretary General congratulated us on our victory over the phone.' https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043417930939904005/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：马扎尔：“德国总理和北约秘书长通过电话祝贺我们取得胜利。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043417930939904005/photo/1 推文

Russia’s foreign policy situation will become significantly more complicated.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043416925343019299/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇭🇺 🇷🇺 俄罗斯帝国主义评论员马克西姆·卡拉什尼科夫对匈牙利选举结果反应称：“欧尔班完了。俄罗斯的外交政策形势将变得更加复杂。”与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043416925343019299/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hungary’s Viktor Orbán: We will never give up. Never, never! https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043416634094727232/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Macron: ‘I just held a meeting with Peter Magyar to congratulate him on his victory in Hungary! France salutes a victory of democratic participation, of the Hungarian people's attachment to the values of the European Union, and for Hungary in Europe. Together, let us advance a more sovereign Europe, for the security of our continent, our competitiveness, and our democracy.’ tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：马克龙：“我刚刚与彼得·马扎尔举行了会晤，祝贺他在匈牙利取得胜利！法国向民主参与的胜利、匈牙利人民对欧盟价值观的坚持以及匈牙利在欧洲的地位致敬。让我们共同推进一个更具主权力的欧洲，为了我们大陆的安全、我们的竞争力和我们的民主。”推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Christopher Helali 🇷🇺🇺🇸: 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🫡 🎖 I spoke with Irishman and SMO veteran Aiden Minnis, recipient of the Medal of Suvorov for courage, to ask him how he felt about going back to the front after spending nearly two weeks in Moscow on vacation for the first time in 15 months. Here are his thoughts. Victory is ours, comrade! 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 Follow me Christopher Helali, on YouTube , X, Instagram, and TikTok
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Christopher Helali 🇷🇺🇺🇸：🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🫡 🎖 我与爱尔兰人、特别军事行动老兵、苏沃洛夫勋章获得者艾登·明尼斯进行了交谈，询问他在莫斯科度假近两周后重返前线的感受，这是他 15 个月来的第一次度假。以下是他的想法。胜利属于我们，同志！🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 在 YouTube、X、Instagram 和 TikTok 上关注我 Christopher Helali

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron: I just held a meeting with Peter Magyar to congratulate him on his victory in Hungary! France salutes a victory of democratic participation, of the Hungarian people's attachment to the values of the European Union…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇸🇪 🇳🇴 🇩🇪 🇱🇹 🇭🇷 More European leaders congratulate Peter Magyar on his election victory over Viktor Orbán. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇫🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙：我刚刚与彼得·马扎尔举行了会晤，祝贺他在匈牙利取得胜利！法国向民主参与的胜利、匈牙利人民对欧盟价值观的坚持致敬……” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇸🇪 🇳🇴 🇩🇪 🇱🇹 🇭🇷 更多欧洲领导人祝贺彼得·马扎尔在选举中战胜维克托·欧尔班。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Hungarian Prime Minister Orban conceeded the parliamentary elections. "Dear friends, the election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear, the election result is painful for us, but clear, we were not given the responsibility and…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Hungarian Prime Minister Orban reassured Hungarians from the opposition. "But no matter how it turned out, we from the opposition will serve our country and the Hungarian nation." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班承认在议会选举中落败。“亲爱的朋友们，选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但已清晰可见，选举结果对我们来说是痛苦的，但很明确，我们没有被赋予责任和……” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班向反对派中的匈牙利人保证。“但无论结果如何，我们作为反对派将继续为我们的国家和匈牙利民族服务。”@wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇪🇺 European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen reacted to Viktor Orbán’s heavy election defeat: 🇭🇺 “Tonight, the heart of Europe beats stronger in Hungary.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043415753446093128/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩对维克托·欧尔班的惨败做出反应：🇭🇺 “今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加有力。”与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043415753446093128/photo/1 推文

text: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian: If the American government abandons its totalitarianism and respects the rights of the Iranian nation, ways to reach an agreement will certainly be found.
text_zh: 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬：如果美国政府放弃极权主义并尊重伊朗民族的权利，达成协议的途径肯定会找到。

text: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 "Europe’s heart is beating stronger in Hungary tonight." - Reich Gauleitierin von der Leyen 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 “今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加有力。” - 帝国大区长冯德莱恩 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: EU's von der Leyen: Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. A country returns to its European path. The Union becomes stronger.
text_zh: 欧盟的冯德莱恩：匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。一个国家回归了它的欧洲道路。欧盟变得更加强大。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇪🇺 EU commission President Von der Leyen: Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. Together, we are stronger. A country reclaims its European path. The Union grows stronger. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron: I just held a meeting with Peter Magyar to congratulate him on his victory in Hungary! France salutes a victory of democratic participation, of the Hungarian people's attachment to the values of the European Union, and for Hungary in Europe. Together, let us advance a more sovereign Europe, for the security of our continent, our competitiveness, and our democracy. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩：匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。我们在一起更强大。一个国家重拾其欧洲道路。欧盟变得更加强大。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇫🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙：我刚刚与彼得·马扎尔举行了会晤，祝贺他在匈牙利取得胜利！法国向民主参与的胜利、匈牙利人民对欧盟价值观的坚持以及匈牙利在欧洲的地位致敬。让我们共同推进一个更具主权力的欧洲，为了我们大陆的安全、我们的竞争力和我们的民主。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Haji Babaei, Deputy Speaker of Parliament, on control of the Strait of Hormuz: "If they had realized we would achieve such a position and take control of the Strait of Hormuz, perhaps they would have been more cautious in going to war with us." Now not only are we not sanctioned, but any country we want can be sanctioned: America is sanctioned, the regime is sanctioned." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 议会副议长哈吉·巴巴伊谈及霍尔木兹海峡的控制权：“如果他们意识到我们会取得这样的地位并控制霍尔木兹海峡，也许他们在与我们开战时会更加谨慎。”现在我们不仅没有受到制裁，而且我们可以制裁任何我们想制裁的国家：美国被制裁了，该政权被制裁了。”🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: An Israeli strike in south Lebanon killed a 1.5-year-old girl and several of her relatives as they gathered for her father’s funeral. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 以色列在黎巴嫩南部的一次袭击中，一名 1.5 岁的女童及其几名亲属在参加她父亲的葬礼时丧生。来源：路透社

Europe has always chosen Hungary. Together, we are stronger. A country reclaims its European path. The Union grows stronger. @wfwitness

text: John Bolton supports Trump's blockade: A blockade makes sense.
text_zh: 约翰·博尔顿支持特朗普的封锁：封锁是有道理的。

text: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The leader of the Patriotic Union of Kurdistan, Bafel Talabani, apologized to neighboring Arab countries that have come under attack from Iraqi soil, offering condolences and expressing shame. He pledged that Iraq’s new government, of which the PUK will be a leading part, will ensure arms are only in the hands of the state, move Iraq away from war, and embrace Arab brothers. He thanked Pakistan, European countries, Turkey, the US, and Iran for their efforts, urging all sides to continue dialogue: “Perhaps these talks can not only end this conflict, but be the start of ending the majority of the issues in the Middle East.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 库尔德斯坦爱国联盟领导人巴菲尔·塔拉巴尼向遭受来自伊拉克境内袭击的邻国阿拉伯国家道歉，表示慰问并感到羞愧。他承诺，库尔德斯坦爱国联盟将作为主要成员参与的伊拉克新政府将确保武器仅掌握在国家手中，使伊拉克远离战争，并拥抱阿拉伯兄弟。他感谢巴基斯坦、欧洲国家、土耳其、美国和伊朗所做的努力，敦促各方继续对话：“也许这些会谈不仅能结束这场冲突，还能成为解决中东大部分问题的开端。”@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Hungarian Prime Minister Orban conceeded the parliamentary elections. "Dear friends, the election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear, the election result is painful for us, but clear, we were not given the responsibility and…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 European Commission president Ursula Von der Leyen: Europe’s heart is beating stronger in Hungary tonight. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班承认在议会选举中落败。“亲爱的朋友们，选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但已清晰可见，选举结果对我们来说是痛苦的，但很明确，我们没有被赋予责任和治理的机会。” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩：今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加有力。@wfwitness

text: EU's von der Leyen: Europe’s heart is beating stronger in Hungary tonight.
text_zh: 欧盟的冯德莱恩：今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加有力。

text: NOW: Viktor Orbán: We will never give up. Never, never!
text_zh: 现在：维克托·欧尔班：我们永远不会放弃。绝不，绝不！

text: 🇱🇧 Tuffaha, Sidon district, Southern Lebanon: Israeli occupation forces committed a massacre using "double-tap" strikes. A drone first targeted a car, killing former mayor Ibrahim Kawtharani and one citizen. When residents gathered to rescue the injured, the drone struck the same location again, killing and wounding more. In another location, six martyrs fell after being targeted by a drone missile. Civil defense workers who came to carry the martyrs were then targeted themselves, some martyred, others wounded. Israel is trying to create widespread psychological pressure on the Resistance environment through committing more massacres in southern Lebanon. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩南部西顿区 Tuffaha：以色列占领军使用“双重打击”战术实施了大屠杀。一架无人机首先瞄准了一辆汽车，杀死了前市长易卜拉欣·考塔拉尼和一名公民。当居民聚集在一起营救伤者时，无人机再次袭击了同一地点，造成更多人伤亡。在另一个地点，六名烈士在被无人机导弹击中后牺牲。前来运送烈士的民防人员随后也成为了目标，一些人牺牲，另一些人受伤。以色列正试图通过在黎巴嫩南部实施更多大屠杀，对抵抗环境施加广泛的心理压力。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: NOW: Viktor Orbán: We will continue to serve our country and the Hungarian nation.
text_zh: 现在：维克托·欧尔班：我们将继续为我们的国家和匈牙利民族服务。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Leader of Hungary's TISZA party Peter Magyar reports that Hungarian Prime Minister Orban called him to congratulated him. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Hungarian Prime Minister Orban conceeded the parliamentary elections. "Dear friends, the election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear, the election result is painful for us, but clear, we were not given the responsibility and opportunity to govern." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利 TISZA 党领导人彼得·马扎尔报告称，匈牙利总理欧尔班致电祝贺他。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班承认在议会选举中落败。“亲爱的朋友们，选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但已清晰可见，选举结果对我们来说是痛苦的，但很明确，我们没有被赋予治理的责任和机会。”

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: NOW: Viktor Orbán: The election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear. The responsibility and opportunity of governance were not given to us. I congratulated the winning party.
text_zh: 现在：维克托·欧尔班：选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但已清晰可见。我们没有被赋予治理的责任和机会。我祝贺了获胜的政党。

text: From the vicinity of Sheikh Ragheb Harb Hospital in Toul
text_zh: 来自 Toul 的谢赫·拉格布·哈尔布医院附近

text: 🇭🇺 Peter Magyar says Orbán congratulated him on his victory. The Tisza Party has also secured a supermajority in parliament. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 彼得·马扎尔表示欧尔班祝贺他取得胜利。Tisza 党也在议会中获得了绝对多数席位。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
